chunks.text: Tcl and Java Programming: Practice and Pitfalls Tcl and Java Programming: Practice and Pitfalls Welcome to the Tcl-Java tutorial! This tutorial was held at the 1998 Tcl/Tk workshop, September 15th, 1998. The tutorial comes in two versions: the on-lin

98. The tutorial comes in two versions: the on-line version and the slide version, which you can read from the links below, Links Tutorial abstract The official abstract of the tutorial. 1998 Tcl/Tk conference page The home page of the 1998 Tcl/Tk co
